productDisplayName: Nike Mens Polo Dark Brown T-shirt
description: Composition Dark brown polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand swoosh on the left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Crafted from a soft cotton fabric that wicks sweat away and offers exemplary dry comfort all day, this T-shirt from nike is a perfect combination of comfort and sport. And is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers and get set to take on the world in style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
